{{Quote|We'll accept execution for our actions, but not from some lapdog of the Emperor.|Climber to Darth Vader|<ref name="Rise of Vader" />}}
'''Climber''' was the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Clone Captain/Legends|captain]] of [[Ion Team]] in the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Climber was the nickname taken by one of the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], born and trained on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] to fight for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Climber was the [[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] of [[Ion Team]] and served as the team's spec-zero. In command of his comrades [[Trace (clone)|Trace]], [[Ras]], and [[Ion Team's spec-one|another commando]], Climber fought alongside [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Roan Shryne]] at the [[Siege of Deko Neimoidia|Battle of Deko Neimoidia]]. The team later fought at [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]] and the [[Battle of Murkhana (Clone Wars)|Battle of Murkhana]], where his life was saved when he impaled an attacking [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] through the chest with a blue [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] borrowed from Shryne.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

When [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] attempted to ambush and kill Shryne, [[Bol Chatak]], and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]] according to [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Climber prevented the ambush by detonating [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|ECDs]], disorienting Salvo and his troops. The commandos then relieved them of their weapons, thus allowing the Jedi to escape, much to Salvo's displeasure. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] himself came to [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]] to provide discipline. Vader reproached the team, accusing them of [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. However, Climber took responsibility for his team, and felt justified in his actions. Lord Vader did not agree with Climber's assessment and drew his lightsaber. Ion Team fell back, drawing their weapons. When Vader moved on the commandos, they opened fire. Ras and another commando were killed when their blaster fire was deflected back into their helmets, and were then cleaved from the shoulder to the hip by Vader's lightsaber. Climber and another commando escaped into a nearby tree line. Climber was struck in the leg by one of his own deflected laser bolts. Vader sent his men to pursue them, with orders to bring them back alive. Climber was later captured by Commander [[Appo/Legends|Appo's]] men.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

==Behind the scenes==
Climber appeared in the [[2005]] novel, ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''.<ref name="Rise of Vader" /> In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Trace's entry incorrectly states Climber to be Ion Team's spec-one,<ref name="Encyclopedia">{{CSWECite|III|257|Trace}}</ref> when in the novel he is established to be the spec-zero.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

==Appearances==
